creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
New Version is out.
	Directory on Mastersite has changed.
	PKPGNAMEPREFIX shall be set,
	even if it is not found Makefile.inc

	The updated port
		german/webalizer2
	shall substitute the port
		german/webalizer

	this would fix PR: ports/21875

How-To-Repeat: 
	apply the patches to use new version.

diff webalizer2/Makefile de-webalizer2-2.1.6/Makefile
--- webalizer2/Makefile	Sun Oct  8 10:25:20 2000
+++ de-webalizer2-2.1.6/Makefile	Fri Oct 20 22:20:06 2000
@@ -5,17 +5,16 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/german/webalizer2/Makefile,v 1.18 2000/10/07 15:56:49 kevlo Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	webalizer
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.5
+PORTVERSION=	2.1.6
 CATEGORIES=	german www
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.mrunix.net/pub/webalizer/pre-release/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.mrunix.net/pub/webalizer/ \
 		ftp://ftp.lan-ks.de/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2.01-05-src
+PKGNAMEPREFIX?=	de-
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2.01-06-src
 
 MAINTAINER=	dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	gd.1:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gd
-
-NO_LATEST_LINK=	yes
 
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
diff webalizer2/distinfo de-webalizer2-2.1.6/distinfo
--- webalizer2/distinfo	Sat Oct  7 17:56:53 2000
+++ de-webalizer2-2.1.6/distinfo	Fri Oct 20 22:13:48 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (webalizer-2.01-05-src.tar.bz2) = ab45bc2c7893c00370a1fcbd9b71232e
+MD5 (webalizer-2.01-06-src.tar.bz2) = 9e52cd91de25c87e29b105e5b23dcdfc
